task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the dither plan instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/dither_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent slews the telescope to the center position of the Leo I Dwarf Galaxy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Observatory or telescope control software (e.g., KStars, Ekos) showing the active target as 'Leo I' or the coordinates RA ~10.1411h, Dec ~+12.3064°.

task_completion.description: Agent captures at least 2 frames at the center position using the Luminance filter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Camera/CCD control software showing an active or completed exposure sequence with the 'Luminance' (or 'lum', 'L') filter, with a frame count of 2 or more.

task_completion.description: Agent executes the 4-point cross dither offsets (North, South, East, West) and captures frames at each.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Telescope control software showing movement to the offset coordinates (Dec ~12.3897, Dec ~12.2231, RA ~10.1468, RA ~10.1354) and camera software capturing images at these new positions.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the captured frames into the specified base directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window listing newly created image files (e.g., .fits) inside the '/home/ga/Images/leo1' directory.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a final log detailing the observation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation or editing of a log file that summarizes the completed dither pattern and captured frames.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual observatory/telescope control GUI to move the mount.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking or entering coordinates in a telescope control application (like KStars/Ekos), not just writing a script that mocks the output.

integrity.description: Agent used the camera control software to capture images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the camera exposure sequence running in the GUI, rather than the agent using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to create fake image files.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply rename or move pre-existing dummy files to bypass capturing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The camera software should visibly show the progress of new exposures being taken and downloaded, rather than the agent just manipulating files in the file manager.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Leo I Dwarf Galaxy. Center coordinates: RA 10.1411h, Dec +12.3064°. Dither offsets (5 arcmin): North (Dec 12.3897), South (Dec 12.2231), East (RA 10.1468), West (RA 10.1354). Tolerances: RA ±0.005, Dec ±0.02. Filter: Luminance (lum, 1, l). Minimum 2 frames per position. Base save directory: /home/ga/Images/leo1.
